title: Case: AI customer-support agent
focus: Tool use + layered guardrails + tiered rollout.

items.label: Anthropic: building effective agents
interviewQuestions: What's an example of an irreversible action that needs hard human-in-the-loop?
How do you keep an agent from looping on a failing tool?
What's your red-team plan for a customer-facing agent?

items.label: Klarna's customer-service AI assistant — public reports
interviewQuestions: What signals from Klarna's deployment would tell you the agent is succeeding?
What metrics would you watch to catch silent regressions?
How would you handle the long tail of edge-case customer requests?

items.label: Tiered rollout: shadow → read-only → tier-1 → tier-2

interviewQuestions: What's an example of an irreversible action that needs hard human-in-the-loop?
How do you keep the agent from looping on a failing tool?
What's your red-team plan for a customer-facing agent?
